description: evaluate a JS expression against the page (or a ref) to extract data (read-only)
rules: read-only — evaluates an expression and returns its value; mutates nothing
runs `playwright-cli eval <PW_EXPR> [PW_REF]` via the bundled npx wrapper
PW_REF binds the expression to one element (e.g. `el => el.textContent`)
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Set PW_EXPR (a JS expression like `document.title`); optional PW_REF binds it to an element; optional PW_SESSION isolates the session. Output: extract.json.
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page to evaluate against the live DOM; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output. Prefer explicit eval over run-code.
